rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port-level assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for binding assignments.
Use valid component type annexes for assumptions and guarantees that reference component ports.
generic_rules: Stateful equations in AGREE should use initialized temporal recurrence patterns.
Branching logic in AGREE should use nested if-then-else structures.
AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **} blocks.
Component type contracts should relate visible outputs to visible inputs without using implementation-only subcomponent paths.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for expressing contract conditions.
Ensure all AGREE variable declarations match the actual types of their expressions.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Avoid referencing subcomponent ports directly in component type annexes.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
